title: Pojarkovia macrophylla
taxonomy: Pojarkovia macrophylla is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Pojarkovia, which is a group of flowering plants. Pojarkovia macrophylla is classified as a member of the tribe Cardueae. The species is native to Central Asia and is often found in dry mountainous areas. Pojarkovia macrophylla is also known as a perennial herb with large leaves and produces small flowers.
uses: Pojarkovia macrophylla has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and it is believed to have various medicinal properties.
